name: Salmon Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the drained salmon, eggs, cornflake crumbs, grated onion, mashed potato (or leftovers), and black pepper.
2. Mix all ingredients together gently until well combined but not overworked.
3. Form the mixture into 3-inch patties.
4. Heat Crisco in a frying pan or skillet over medium heat.
5. Once the Crisco is hot, add the salmon patties to the pan.
6. Fry the patties for 7-8 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
7. Remove the patties from the pan using a spatula and let them drain on a paper towel-lined plate.
8. Turn off the heat and allow the Crisco to cool slightly before disposing of any remaining fat.
